'''Krell''' was originally [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Twolz]]'s regular [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]]. When Twolz was killed, Krell and Twolz' protégé, [[Dannen Lifehold]], set up a small shop on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]].<ref name="BF" /> He was killed during the [[Destruction of Alderaan/Legends|destruction of Alderaan]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].
